<svg viewBox="0 0 620 520" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

    <linearGradient id="surfaceGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#fafafa;stop-opacity:1"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="accentGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#2458f3;stop-opacity:1"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1e4bd0;stop-opacity:1"/>

  </defs>
  
  <g id="component_root">
    <!-- Main Card Container -->
    <rect x="20" y="20" width="580" height="480" rx="10" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#cardShadow)"/>
    
    <!-- Header Section -->

    <line x1="40" y1="90" x2="580" y2="90" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    
    <!-- Column 1: Claude Instance -->
    <g id="col_claude">
      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="375" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>

      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fafafa"/>

      <circle cx="58" cy="123" r="6" fill="#d97706"/>

      <circle cx="191" cy="123" r="2.5" fill="#10b981"/>
      <text x="170" y="127" font-family="Roboto Mono, monospace" font-size="8" fill="#9ca3af">●</text>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 1 (User) -->
      <rect x="50" y="155" width="147" height="48" rx="8" fill="#f3f4f6"/>
      <text x="60" y="175" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#4b5563">Analyze architectural</text>
      <text x="60" y="187" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#4b5563">tradeoffs for BRS</text>
      <text x="60" y="199" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#4b5563">module integration</text>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 2 (Assistant) -->
      <rect x="50" y="213" width="147" height="85" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="233" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#111827">Key considerations:</text>
      <text x="60" y="251" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">• AST surgical precision</text>
      <text x="60" y="263" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">• Genome abstraction layers</text>
      <text x="60" y="275" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">• FAST→BUILD funnel alignment</text>
      <text x="60" y="287" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#6b7280">Confidence: 96%</text>
      
      <!-- Input Area -->
      <rect x="50" y="440" width="147" height="32" rx="6" fill="#f9fafb" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="459" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#9ca3af">Message Claude...</text>
      <circle cx="185" cy="456" r="8" fill="#d97706" opacity="0.1"/>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Column 2: GPT-4 Instance -->
    <g id="col_gpt" transform="translate(187, 0)">
      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="375" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
      <!-- Window Header -->
      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fafafa"/>
      <rect x="40" y="125" width="167" height="16" fill="#fafafa"/>
      <circle cx="58" cy="123" r="6" fill="#10a37f"/>
      <text x="70" y="127" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="#374151">GPT-4</text>
      <circle cx="191" cy="123" r="2.5" fill="#10b981"/>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 1 (User) -->
      <rect x="50" y="155" width="147" height="38" rx="8" fill="#f3f4f6"/>
      <text x="60" y="172" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#4b5563">Analyze architectural</text>
      <text x="60" y="184" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#4b5563">tradeoffs...</text>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 2 (Assistant) -->
      <rect x="50" y="203" width="147" height="95" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="223" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#111827">Architecture Analysis:</text>
      <text x="60" y="241" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">1. Dual-model orchestration</text>
      <text x="60" y="253" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">2. Surgical edit vs rewrite</text>
      <text x="60" y="265" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">3. Sullivan genome mapping</text>
      <text x="60" y="277" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">4. Retro-genome validation</text>
      <text x="60" y="289" font-family="Roboto Mono, monospace" font-size="8" fill="#9ca3af">tokens: 482</text>
      
      <!-- Input Area -->
      <rect x="50" y="440" width="147" height="32" rx="6" fill="#f9fafb" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="459" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#9ca3af">Message GPT-4...</text>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Column 3: Gemini Instance (Active/Accent) -->
    <g id="col_gemini" transform="translate(374, 0)">
      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="375" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#2458f3" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <!-- Window Header -->
      <rect x="40" y="105" width="167" height="36" rx="8" fill="url(#surfaceGrad)"/>
      <rect x="40" y="125" width="167" height="16" fill="url(#surfaceGrad)"/>
      <path d="M54 123 L60 117 L66 123 L60 129 Z" fill="#2458f3"/>
      <text x="74" y="127" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="600" fill="#374151">Gemini</text>
      <circle cx="191" cy="123" r="2.5" fill="#2458f3"/>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 1 (User) -->
      <rect x="50" y="155" width="147" height="42" rx="8" fill="#eff6ff"/>
      <text x="60" y="173" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#1e40af">Analyze architectural</text>
      <text x="60" y="185" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#1e40af">tradeoffs for BRS...</text>
      
      <!-- Chat Bubble 2 (Assistant) -->
      <rect x="50" y="207" width="147" height="90" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#dbeafe" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="227" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="600" fill="#111827">System Design:</text>
      <text x="60" y="245" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">→ S-T-A-R philosophy core</text>
      <text x="60" y="257" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">→ R1 reasoning engine</text>
      <text x="60" y="269" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">→ Fast model execution</text>
      <text x="60" y="281" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#4b5563">→ Pristine code output</text>
      
      <!-- Highlight Bar -->
      <rect x="52" y="209" width="3" height="86" rx="1" fill="#2458f3"/>
      
      <!-- Input Area -->
      <rect x="50" y="440" width="147" height="32" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#2458f3" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
      <rect x="50" y="440" width="147" height="32" rx="6" fill="none" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="60" y="459" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#2458f3">Message Gemini...</text>
      <circle cx="185" cy="456" r="6" fill="#2458f3"/>
      <path d="M182 456 L188 456 M185 453 L185 459" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Footer Status -->

    <circle cx="555" cy="502" r="3" fill="#10b981"/>
    <text x="563" y="505" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#6b7280">Live</text>
  </g>
</svg>
